caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a political tweet by Akhilesh Yadav. The tweet criticizes the BJP for their actions and strategies in Bihar's Lok Sabha elections, suggesting that they have insulted the people of Bihar and will face consequences in the upcoming elections. The screen displays the tweet along with a headline in Hindi that translates to "Congress is in trouble, Tejashwi's 'picture' is left." The video also features images of Chief Minister Nitish Kumar and other political figures, indicating their involvement or relevance to the ongoing discussion. The breaking news banner at the bottom emphasizes the urgency and importance of the story being reported. The timestamp shows it is 10:05 PM, suggesting this is a late-night news update.
